contract_claim: `except subprocess.CalledProcessError` in `launch_with_npx` (L64-66) is unreachable: `subprocess.Popen(...)` never raises `CalledProcessError`. Only `subprocess.run(..., check=True)` does. This handler will never fire for the npx path.
observed_behavior: `except subprocess.CalledProcessError` in `launch_with_npx` (L64-66) is unreachable: `subprocess.Popen(...)` never raises `CalledProcessError`. Only `subprocess.run(..., check=True)` does. This handler will never fire for the npx path.
